name: NPM Sentinel MCP Server
what_it_does: Community MCP server for NPM package security analysis — enabling AI agents to check npm packages for vulnerabilities, inspect package metadata, audit dependencies, and get security insights from the npm registry.
use_cases: Checking npm package vulnerabilities before installation in agent workflows
Auditing project dependencies for security issues from agents
Inspecting npm package metadata (author, maintainers, versions) for trust signals
Comparing package versions for breaking changes and security patches
Supply chain security analysis of npm dependency trees
not_for: Deep code analysis (static analysis beyond npm audit)
Private npm registry packages without access
best_when: An agent needs to evaluate npm package security, audit dependencies, or inspect npm package metadata before recommending or using a package.
avoid_when: You need Python, Java, or other ecosystem package security analysis — this is npm-specific.

auth.notes: Public npm registry is accessible without auth. NPM token required for private packages or higher rate limits. Token stored as NPM_TOKEN env var.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free for public npm package analysis
pricing.paid_tiers: None for public packages; npm Pro/Teams for private registry access
pricing.notes: Free for all public npm package analysis. MCP server is open source.

performance.rate_limits: npm Registry API: rate limits apply to unauthenticated requests; token increases limits

known_agent_gotchas: npm audit data may be delayed relative to NVD — CVE disclosure lag can be hours to days
Unauthenticated npm registry requests have aggressive rate limits — add token for production use
Community MCP — not official npm; may miss some registry API features
Scoped packages (@org/pkg) require special handling in queries
Deprecated packages still appear in registry — agents should check deprecation status
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced (npm registry uses HTTPS). Auth token has no fine-grained scopes for registry queries. Free public API suitable for most agent security checking use cases.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. npm registry is a trusted data source. Token security for private packages.
